# X.ALT Studios

> Premier Virtual Production, Cinematic Visual Effects (VFX), and Immersive AR/VR Experiences Studio.

## Overview
X.ALT Studios is a next-generation creative technology studio specializing in end-to-end virtual production, real-time CGI, photorealistic 3D visualization, cinematic VFX for films and commercials, and interactive spatial computing (AR/VR).

## Key Offerings & Capabilities
- **Virtual Production & Previz**: In-camera visual effects (ICVFX), LED volume stage rendering, real-time pre-visualization.
- **Cinematic Visual Effects (VFX)**: High-end compositing, 3D asset generation, creature animation, particle simulation.
- **Commercial & Feature Productions**: Visual design, motion graphics, and full-pipeline production support.
- **AR/VR & Immersive Experiences**: WebGL, WebXR, Unreal Engine / Unity spatial applications.
